findings.claim_text: ChangXin Memory Technologies — listing as 长鑫科技, ticker 688825 — opens subscription for its RMB 29.5 billion STAR Market IPO on July 16, 2026, the largest A-share listing of the year and the second-largest in the exchange's history[^2,61].
Q1 2026 revenue hit RMB 50.8 billion, up 719.13% year over year, with attributable net profit up 1,688.3%[^9]
CXMT is **not** on the Commerce Entity List — the binding one that cuts off US-origin exports [^41].
